CustomField.formula: IF(SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c == 0, 0, IF(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__DiscountScheduleType__c, 'Slab') && NOT(SBQQ__Existing__c), IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c == 0, 0, (SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c * SBQQ__Quantity__c - SBQQ__NetPrice__c) / (SBQQ__Quantity__c * SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c)), IF(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__DiscountScheduleType__c, 'Slab') && SBQQ__Existing__c, IF(SBQQ__Quantity__c == SBQQ__PriorQuantity__c, 0, (SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c * (SBQQ__Quantity__c-SBQQ__PriorQuantity__c) - SBQQ__NetPrice__c) / ((SBQQ__Quantity__c-SBQQ__PriorQuantity__c) * SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c)), (SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c - SBQQ__NetPrice__c) / SBQQ__ProratedListPrice__c)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total discount from list price after factoring in one-time credits.
CustomField.label: Total Discount %
